title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Max Life Insurance

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Max Life Insurance
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Max Life Insurance! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Bengaluru team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Max Life Insurance:
Max Life Insurance is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Max Life Insurance!
